reviews.comment:
Caí ahí, porque pasaba y me quedé sin combustible, pero malisimo la atención, el que te ubicaba (si era el que ubicaba) te mandaba para el lado que no había combustible y para retomar era marcha atrás (te imaginas el quilombo) y el playero qué me toco, se ve que no tenia un buen día el amigo, ni ganas tenía (lo tuve que esperar parado al lado)..ojalá a los próximos los atiendan mejor!.
Respondo el comentario: No fue el día de paro, fue un día común sin conflictos.

(Translated by Google)
I ended up there because I was passing by and ran out of gas, but the service was terrible. The person who was supposed to direct you (if that was even him) kept sending you to the side where there was no gas, and to get back on track you had to reverse (can you imagine the mess?). And the attendant I got clearly wasn't having a good day; he didn't seem to be in the mood (I had to wait standing next to him). I hope they treat you better next time!

Responding to the comment: It wasn't a strike day; it was a regular day with no problems.

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos disculpas hoy fue un día de paro y conflictos gremiales gracias
